text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs

This code system https://gematik.de/fhir/tiflow/core/CodeSystem/tiflow-operation-outcome-details-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinitionDeutsch (Deutschland) (German (Germany), de)
TIFLOW_SECRET_MISMATCH Task secret mismatchThe provided task secret does not match the secret stored for the taskTask-Secret stimmt nicht überein
TIFLOW_MEDICATION_DISPENSE_MISSING MedicationDispense missingA required MedicationDispense resource is missing for this operationMedicationDispense fehlt
TIFLOW_SIGNATURE_NO_OCSP_RESPONSE No OCSP response for signatureCertificate revocation status could not be determined because no OCSP response was availableKeine OCSP-Antwort zur Signatur
TIFLOW_AUTH_ROLE_NOT_ALLOWED Access role not allowedThe authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operationZugriffsrolle nicht zulässig
TIFLOW_CONSENT_ALREADY_EXISTS Consent already existsA consent for the same scope already exists and cannot be created againEinwilligung existiert bereits
TIFLOW_CONSENT_CATEGORY_REQUIRED Consent category requiredThe consent category is mandatory and was not providedEinwilligungskategorie erforderlich
TIFLOW_CONSENT_CATEGORY_INVALID Consent category invalidThe provided consent category is unknown or not allowedEinwilligungskategorie ungültig
TIFLOW_ACCESSCODE_MISMATCH Access code mismatchThe provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the taskAccessCode stimmt nicht überein
TIFLOW_TASK_REQUIRED Task requiredA task reference is required for this operation but was not providedTask-Angabe erforderlich
TIFLOW_TASK_NOT_FOUND Task not foundThe referenced task does not existTask nicht gefunden
TIFLOW_CONSENT_REQUIRED Consent requiredA valid consent is required to execute this operationEinwilligung erforderlich
TIFLOW_MESSAGE_TO_SELF Message to self not allowedA communication message addressed to the sender itself is not permittedNachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig
TIFLOW_COMMUNICATION_PAYLOAD_INVALID Communication payload invalidThe communication payload is syntactically or semantically invalidKommunikationsinhalt ungültig
TIFLOW_INSURANT_NOT_ELIGIBLE Insurant not eligibleThe insurant does not meet the eligibility constraints for this communication flowVersicherter nicht berechtigt
TIFLOW_RECIPIENT_INVALID Recipient invalidThe specified recipient is invalid for the requested communicationEmpfänger ungültig
TIFLOW_TASK_STATUS_MISMATCH Task status mismatchThe task is in a status that does not allow execution of this operationTask-Status passt nicht
TIFLOW_TASK_EXPIRED Task expiredThe task cannot be processed because its redemption period has expiredTask ist abgelaufen
TIFLOW_MVO_NOT_VALID_YET MVO not valid yetThe multi-prescription is not yet valid at the current point in timeMVO noch nicht gültig
TIFLOW_AUTH_NOT_OWNER Authenticated actor is not ownerThe authenticated actor is not the owner of the addressed taskAuthentifizierter Akteur ist nicht Eigentümer
TIFLOW_TASK_ID_REQUIRED Task id requiredThe operation requires a task id in the requestTask-ID erforderlich
TIFLOW_KVNR_MISMATCH KVNR mismatchThe KVNR in the request does not match the KVNR assigned to the task contextKVNR stimmt nicht überein
TIFLOW_SIGNATURE_INVALID Signature invalidThe digital signature is invalid or cannot be verifiedSignatur ungültig
TIFLOW_FLOWTYPE_MISMATCH Flow type mismatchThe task flow type does not match the expected flow for this operationFlowtyp passt nicht
TIFLOW_KVNR_INVALID KVNR invalidThe provided KVNR is invalid or does not conform to the expected formatKVNR ungültig
TIFLOW_SIGNATURE_AUTHOREDON_MISMATCH Signature authoredOn mismatchThe authoredOn timestamp does not match the signed contentSignaturzeitpunkt passt nicht
TIFLOW_IKNR_INVALID IKNR invalidThe provided IKNR is invalid or not accepted in this contextIKNR ungültig
TIFLOW_LANR_ZANR_INVALID LANR or ZANR invalidThe provided LANR or ZANR is invalid or not accepted for this operationLANR oder ZANR ungültig
TIFLOW_TASK_DELETED Task deletedThe task was already cancelled or deleted and can no longer be processedTask wurde gelöscht
TIFLOW_RESOURCE_FULLURL_INVALID Bundle fullUrl invalidA resource fullUrl in the bundle is invalid or does not match the bundle rulesBundle-fullUrl ungültig
TIFLOW_BOM_DETECTED Byte order mark detectedA UTF byte order mark was detected where it is not permittedByte-Order-Mark erkannt
TIFLOW_MEDICATION_DISPENSE_INVALID MedicationDispense invalidThe provided MedicationDispense resource is invalid for this operationMedicationDispense ungültig
TIFLOW_SIGNATURE_INVALID_ISSUING_ROLE Signature issuing role invalidThe signature was created by an actor role that is not allowed for the signed artifactSignaturrolle ungültig
TIFLOW_COVERAGE_TYPE_MISMATCH Coverage type mismatchThe coverage type does not match the expected coverage contextCoverage-Typ passt nicht
TIFLOW_ALTERNATIVE_IK_FORBIDDEN Alternative IK forbiddenUse of an alternative IK is not permitted in this contextAlternatives IK nicht erlaubt
TIFLOW_ACCESS_PERMISSION_INVALID Access permission invalidThe requested access permission is invalid or not sufficientZugriffsberechtigung ungültig
TIFLOW_CONSENT_MISSING Consent missingNo required consent was found for this operationEinwilligung fehlt
TIFLOW_ACCESS_CODE_INVALID Access code invalidThe provided access code is syntactically invalidAccessCode ungültig
TIFLOW_CERTIFICATE_INVALID Certificate invalidThe certificate used for authentication or signature validation is invalidZertifikat ungültig
TIFLOW_META_PROFILE_INVALID Meta profile invalidThe resource meta.profile entry is missing, invalid, or not supportedMeta-Profil ungültig
TIFLOW_OCSP_BACKEND_ERROR Invalid OCSP responseFailed to retrieve the OCSP response for the certificate of the signatureOCSP Abfrage fehlgeschlagen

name: TIFLOWOperationOutcomeDetailsCS
title: TIFLOW Operation Outcome Details CS
description: Codes, die im Rahmen des TIFlow in den OperationOutcomes.details angegeben werden können

concept.definition: The provided task secret does not match the secret stored for the task
A required MedicationDispense resource is missing for this operation
Certificate revocation status could not be determined because no OCSP response was available
The authenticated actor role is not permitted to execute this operation
A consent for the same scope already exists and cannot be created again
The consent category is mandatory and was not provided
The provided consent category is unknown or not allowed
The provided access code does not match the access code assigned to the task
A task reference is required for this operation but was not provided
The referenced task does not exist
A valid consent is required to execute this operation
A communication message addressed to the sender itself is not permitted

designation.value: Nachricht an sich selbst nicht zulässig

The insurant does not meet the eligibility constraints for this communication flow
The specified recipient is invalid for the requested communication

The multi-prescription is not yet valid at the current point in time
The authenticated actor is not the owner of the addressed task
The operation requires a task id in the request
The KVNR in the request does not match the KVNR assigned to the task context
The digital signature is invalid or cannot be verified

The authoredOn timestamp does not match the signed content

A UTF byte order mark was detected where it is not permitted
The provided MedicationDispense resource is invalid for this operation
The signature was created by an actor role that is not allowed for the signed artifact
The coverage type does not match the expected coverage context
Use of an alternative IK is not permitted in this context
